case_for: Carr's last two games (13.4 and 20.5) show improved form and the projection of 20.5 pts sits well above the 12-point threshold, suggesting a favorable matchup and role.
case_against: Carr's game log is volatile with three of six outings below 12 points (8.0, 8.1, and barely-there 12.6), showing a real bust risk even with a solid median projection.
